verdict.rationale: The claim's 13.053m EUR matches the Regional Performance Q2 2026 figure exactly, but the authoritative Finance Pack v2 (final restatement, approved 15 July 2026) reports the qualified pipeline at 13.510m EUR for the same period. The regional document explicitly states its pipeline 'is not ranked against Finance' (different CRM qualification methodology), so no authority ordering exists between the two competing values.
verdict.suggested_action: Determine which pipeline definition the master document intended; if it is the Finance management-accounts figure, the claim should be 13.510m EUR, not 13.053m.

evidence.span_text:

Qualified pipeline 13.510 12.888 13.104
...
Final restatement, approved 15 July 2026.

Qualified pipeline 13.510 12.888 13.104
...
PRELIMINARY - superseded on 15 July 2026 by restated v2.
